outcomes.title: Fundamentals #1
outcomes.description:
Evaluate sine, cosine, tangent, cotangent, secant, or cosecant
        of angles on the unit circle in both degrees [0°, 360°) and
        radians [0, 2π), giving exact simplified answers.
outcomes.template:
Evaluate each trigonometric expression. Give exact answers using whole numbers or simplified fractions with rationalized denominators.

Evaluate {{tasks.0.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.0.angle}}\right).

{{tasks.0.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.0.angle}}\right) = {{tasks.0.answer}}

Evaluate {{tasks.1.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.1.angle}}\right).

{{tasks.1.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.1.angle}}\right) = {{tasks.1.answer}}

Evaluate {{tasks.2.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.2.angle}}\right).

{{tasks.2.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.2.angle}}\right) = {{tasks.2.answer}}

Evaluate {{tasks.3.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.3.angle}}\right).

{{tasks.3.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.3.angle}}\right) = {{tasks.3.answer}}

Evaluate {{tasks.4.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.4.angle}}\right).

{{tasks.4.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.4.angle}}\right) = {{tasks.4.answer}}

Evaluate {{tasks.5.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.5.angle}}\right).

{{tasks.5.fname}}\!\left({{tasks.5.angle}}\right) = {{tasks.5.answer}}

outcomes.title: Fundamentals #2
outcomes.description: Determine whether the value of a trig function is positive or negative in each quadrant, and whether the function is increasing or decreasing in each quadrant. .
outcomes.template:
For each statement, determine whether the trig function is positive or negative and whether it is increasing or decreasing on that quadrant.

1. In Quadrant {{tasks.0.quadrant}}, {{tasks.0.fname}} is (positive/negative) and (increasing/decreasing).

Answer: {{tasks.0.fname}} is {{tasks.0.sign}} and {{tasks.0.mono}} in Quadrant {{tasks.0.quadrant}}.

2. In Quadrant {{tasks.1.quadrant}}, {{tasks.1.fname}} is (positive/negative) and (increasing/decreasing).

Answer: {{tasks.1.fname}} is {{tasks.1.sign}} and {{tasks.1.mono}} in Quadrant {{tasks.1.quadrant}}.

3. In Quadrant {{tasks.2.quadrant}}, {{tasks.2.fname}} is (positive/negative) and (increasing/decreasing).

Answer: {{tasks.2.fname}} is {{tasks.2.sign}} and {{tasks.2.mono}} in Quadrant {{tasks.2.quadrant}}.

4. In Quadrant {{tasks.3.quadrant}}, {{tasks.3.fname}} is (positive/negative) and (increasing/decreasing).

Answer: {{tasks.3.fname}} is {{tasks.3.sign}} and {{tasks.3.mono}} in Quadrant {{tasks.3.quadrant}}.

outcomes.title: Fundamentals #3
outcomes.description: Label a right triangle with standard labeling and and the provided side lengths, then find the requested values.
outcomes.template:
Label a right triangle with standard labeling (C is the right angle and c is the hypotenuse) with {{given_text}}, then find each of the following. Give exact answers (whole numbers or simplified fractions with rationalized denominators).

\sin A = ________

\cos A = ________

\tan A = ________

\sin B = ________

\cos B = ________

\tan B = ________

\sin A={{sinA}},\ \cos A={{cosA}},\ \tan A={{tanA}}

\sin B={{sinB}},\ \cos B={{cosB}},\ \tan B={{tanB}}

 ``
